CustomField.description: Detection priority order. Lower numbers are processed first. Use this to ensure specific patterns (like credit cards) are matched before more general patterns (like phone numbers). Default is 100.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Lower number = runs first. Set specific/narrow patterns (e.g., credit card=10) before broad ones (e.g., phone=100) to prevent partial overlaps. Default: 100.
CustomField.label: Priority
